title: refactor: remove Deref<Target=str> from Id and UTCDate newtypes
description:
## Problem
impl_string_newtype\! adds Deref<Target=str> to Id and UTCDate. This defeats the newtype by allowing &Id to silently coerce to &str at any &str-expecting call site. The correct bound for 'can be viewed as a string' is AsRef<str>, which requires explicit .as_ref() and preserves the type distinction.

## Solution
Remove the Deref impl from impl_string_newtype\!. Keep AsRef<str>, Display, PartialEq<str>, PartialEq<String>, and the symmetric impls. Update any call sites that relied on implicit coercion to use .as_str() or .as_ref() explicitly.

## Acceptance
- Deref<Target=str> removed from Id and UTCDate
- AsRef<str> retained
- Compiler catches any formerly-implicit coercions; call sites updated
- All tests pass
